star_1.text: Dear Support Team, I am experiencing an issue when using Spotify while playing a game on my device. Whenever I open a game and start playing music on Spotify, the music stops as soon as I return to or continue the game. Previously, I was able to play Spotify in the background while gaming without any interruptions. However, this issue has started occurring recently. I would appreciate it if you could kindly look into this matter and advise me on how to resolve it. Thank you for your assistance.

Started playing this game today. It seemed decent, but I can't fully control the airplane. The checkpoint before the runway is super annoying I can't steer down that quickly As soon as I turn down thrust and tilt, I hit the water! Would be better with a checkpoint before the runway. Been flying for over 14 years. This is one of the worst sims ive ever used. You can't even walk to the plane, why? Pros: There is a free version you can play before buying. This is a really good thing because it allows you to see how much of a waste of money purchasing would be, saving you capital and valuable moments of your life. Cons: Everything. Conclusion: Do anything else but play this game.

is early of 2026 still no updates I rate 1 star because u didn't add 1.35 version or even gunship mode lol. Didn't add new planes called AC-130, AC-400 AV-40 and more... futures like gun selection and customize your character new customization items in any plane. didn't add liverys for C-400 MC-400 and C-130 new water vehicles like Destroyer, aircraft carrier, and subrine didn't new ground vehicles like humvee, and army van. every time when I accidentally press my favorite plane not use I cannot put it back so I need a favor to fix that so if accidentally press not use can be press again and actually that's my favorite plane

I as an aviator can say that this simulator can use some adjustments. The physics are very inaccurate, and it is close to impossible to recover a stall if you wanna do self-stall training. If a stall happens, you're supposed to have nose pitch down, and full throttle (full power) to recover, but these physics say opposite. Not only that, but I think autopilot controls for climb and descent needs to be worked on too. It's like going for a roller coaster ride which is against the FAA safety guide.

there is a ghost plane and it was trying to hit us and we are really scared pls fix it we might delete it then there was a another one so we liked it till that happened pls tell me if it happens to any one else

This is a rubbish game because there is no tutorial on how to fly the plane in the game for beginners

it does not adapt to samsung Fold 6 screen. controls too smal on front screen too. when it does I will update. let me know. looks exiting. if you can boost the graphics, that is something you could use as a reward for completing missions. slap some ads in the game as livery and banners in hangars and as cargo etc." bring this load of coca cola to a storm wrecked remote place" or you could purchase higher graphics any time. also add a feedback thing in the game. see microsoft feedback hub.

star_2.text: I've stopped playing the game after one of the updates came out and now it stops my music when I play the game. I use the music for some really awesome song cues for landing the plane. if the developer sees this please fix it.

I've downloaded this game multiple times and it is always the same, fun, simple, easy to configure. This new update is great! I love trying to dodge SAM missiles. I just wish there was a setting to turn up the fire on the aircraft when crashing. EDIT: The ads no longer give you cash :c I watch them and it never shows the X, so I'm stuck in the ad until I close the app...

the ads don't work and I can't fix it. I have been playing this game for a while but when I got a new phone the ads system isn't working and I tried deleting and redownloading and resetting my phone but nothing will work I can still play it but not get coins

best ui I ever seen in an Android flight game everything like cockpit buttons, also even in gameplay, lever or gear ui and it's animations to throttles and to turn turn sideways were cool to use too. just needed details and more realistic uis or cockpit view itself or something with really great graphics

Having the runway parallel to heading but a mile off to the right, and being expected hit fast approaching checkpoints up, down, left, and right is ridiculous. It's frustrating because I'm stuck and can't progress to where I'd be able to use additional planes.

Very realistic but many problems first the controls sometjmes dont work properly. The game is just beautiful and great it really gives you that realistic feeling but if we were to carry passengers in the free mode that would be fantastic and if you were to add more characters in the airport that would be nice pls add these things

Very good game. Cool models, graphics, air traffic and the the ability to walk around. Although I would like to see a multiplayer mode. Edìt: I've been waiting for the new update for 4 months now when it said it would come out in January.

It looks amazing, I bet the rest of it is just as good but it really bothers me that it just ignores when I change from tilt to joystick. I don't like tilt controls I don't know why it won't change when I change the settings, I've hit calibrate, I've saved it to a preset and used that preset, I'm out.

In my 1 year playing this game I will say this is the best airplane simulation I have ever played cuz the controls and tutorials are very simple and I have been impressed about the graphic of this game even this game intended for kids and you will be experience being a pilot for short period of time.
The bloody game is crushing and having bugs, why are you guys relaxed about this, it has been months now

Try to improve the graphics add some long and more realistic flights and add some clouds for the plane to fly over in the long flights just to make it more realistic and exciting but overall it's the best flight simulator I've ever played,good game play and controls.

No controller support. Controllers are so easy and common to use, I don't understand why anyone would not allow controllers for a game like this. Further, the tutorial completely ignores your control choice and forces you to go through calibrating tilt controls even after setting the controls to sticks only. This was a breaking point. Didn't bother wasting my time after this point. Devs, if you read this, have the tutorial use the selected control method. And add controllers.

This game is a great game to play. The graphics is good and I enjoy to play it but just only one thing that this game don't have any reset button. So I cannot reset your settings for controlling joystick and others settings. To the game developer please add reset button so I can reset my settings. ASAP! TQ
late update, need jet fighter and need to fast update to more military planes

The game is good have a nice graphics and physics but the only thing is.. it's getting boring because you guys never add a new plane (like) big passenger planes/jet fighters/or even the oldest plane. But I recommend it for those who wants to experience some iconic flight

I can't watch rewarded ads because it says that there is none available in my region. I was able to before but this has just happened now. I like the game,the graphics and the (e.t.c).But the game does not obey the laws of physics of a real plane,I am a student cadet pilot and one thing I want to point out are the rudders,they are too sensitive,there are no joystick option for left handed people,there are no trims either which are very important,there are only two lights signal and main,there should had been,nav lights,beacon lights,taxi lights and (e.t.c).And one last request please make a A.T.C tower.Thank you.

It's very unrealistic. Heavy planes handle like feathers and the game uses km/h and meters instead of feet and knots and there are many other things that you very obviously can't or wouldn't do in real life. All tho I'd guess it's still quite good for beeing a mobile game made with unity but I've seen way better mobile flight sims than this.

Please bring back the old vehicle physics where it doesn't break or at least make a settings of it, I can no longer have fun to this game because the car breaks always, now jumping to mountain with cars is no longer fun, at least make a settings of it not breaking, that's the most fun sources on this game, now I don't feel any fun if my car breaks even to the smallest jiggle. I can't even climb on mountains with my car. Please bring it back or make a chooce to make the car immortal from anything

star_3.text: I love how there are lots of real aircraft controls and how it's so realistic. But there are a couple things I would like to be added in the future. 1. Better collisions. Even though it's great that when you run into something like a hill or runway the aircraft falls apart, I would like to see an explosion and fire with more pieces falling apart. 2. More vehicles. Simply just more cars and maybe a helicopter and some big jetliners. Add those = 5 stars.

It hasn't had many updates the last update was December and it started to get very boring without any updates. I think you should be able to have all the coding already into the new unit. Unity thing for the game so I only give this 3 stars because it gets very boring and there. Hasn't been. Updates almost a year. But I? Like how hes going to add more planes? But the downside is he should have this coding already into the new system disco. So that's why i'm getting it three stars please hurryup

Like the relatively detailed cockpits, true 3D graphics, ability to explore as a person, realistic flight models inside and out, and most importantly, the physics. I have been using it for a while. The PS-26 has problems as there's only audio from the left side.

I was wondering if you guys could add an update where the plane doesn't stall and crash when you slow down but also I can't deploy my landing gear when I slow down to more than slow enough to deploy it and that caused me to crash into a mountain and fail the same mission multiple times. Also can you guys add boats or whatever to this game? There's no real games that have all this cool stuff but I really like it and I want more vehicles, and maybe add weapons?

one of the best avietion games. But some features should be needed. Please remove the noisey sound and bring actual plane sound. Add also some passenger plane (Boeing, Airbus) and passenger flight mission. Also add some more maps ( including city)

A very good game. Please add people, vehicles etc on the streets and also other flying aircrafts to give life to the islands. Being alone feels strange and makes the game somehow boring. I'd also recommend commercial flights in free mode for some cash, eg transporting people and goods from one airport to another. I know that adding all these recommendations is not an easy task but I'll be patient and careful not to a 4 or 5 star rating before I see improvements.

Alright, I love this game. Its one of the BEST flight simulators on Android. However, there are 2 major downsides. One, is that your progress isn't saved, and when you switch devices you have to buy everything back, and start from square one. The second issue is that the missions are quite difficult, and this is due to the checkpoint system. The checkpoints in the air are way too low and sharp, especially with the larger planes. This gets very annoying, leading to newer players crashing often

The flight simulator itself isn't just well organized but it also has great game experience unlike other flight simulators. When I was playing the game, I've felt that I'm a real life pilot. I learned how to be more serious on controlling vehicles. However, there are less aircrafts and less maps to play with in the game and the islands are so small. It would be better if you'll add more aircrafts such as trainer aircraft, glider, etc. and add more maps to play with. Also, add more missions.

The new update won't let me play other audio in the background. now I can't blast Sabaton while dodging missiles in a C-130. this used to be my favorite game, but now its unplayable. other than that, this is the best flight simulator on mobile.
this game is good and all but there aren't enough warnings like windshear, Traffic and more and also, all planes have the Same Warning sounds which I don't like.

This game was alright for a bit but it's been months and months and the developer never updates it. I understand personal life may be a bit challenging but it's honestly absurd. this game has terrible update rates and always takes forever while not reaching the update quota. if the updates were a little unique it would be better but usually they are just re skinning an airplane with no unique new features. This game needs more content before it can be 5 stars, otherwise a great game.
very good game lot of planes and vehicles but for some reason I can't watch adds so I can gat tokens . Really hope this game adds multiplayer mode . Really nice game
Adds are hard to exit and very frustrating. The game is good otherwise. If it keeps being hard to exit I will delete the game.

The game is nice but the airplanes are just too light, how can a cargo plane fly like a paper, please make the planes heavy, and you can see through the plane from a different view which is not good, the cars don't have side mirrors which is also not proper, when the plane crashes it doesn't have explosion instead breaks like bottles, and also try to add cities in the game and not just hills and mountains, please *MR DEVELOPER* correct all this. I will give it 3 stars. Thanks.

More time should be given to complete each level to earn full wings because it is difficult to control and maneuver the aircraft in order to beat the time as well as reach all checkpoints. Improve vehicle driving ability and widen the roads as vehicles don't steer well while on the roads. Plus free flight mode ends when vehicle breaks from small jump.
The ads are annoying and I really wish there was a way to save your progress on free flight. This would be 5 stars if that was possible.
Overall best game but if you add Multiplayer option in it to play with your Friends to have more fun and to interact with all over world players.Thanks
the game is good but I can not see the player that i am using and the speed of the player is to slow pls make it more high add pupil there too let there be multi player lan WIFI offline
it's good but you don't get to build your own plane you don't get to go in-person in aircraft viewer you can't get in to aircraft fuselage debris
The game is goodbut when i landed a plane properly, it crashed. Anyways,can you add a few airliner planes like 747 and A350

star_4.text: Pretty fun game. The missions and checkpoints are a bit too much (the checkpoints are basicaly setup to make you crash unless you got crazy good skills). Lots of planes to choose from, but yes, they are only prop planes. Game play is pretty realistic. Being able to change from pilot to in-person so you can walk around is pretty awesome. Well built game. Can't wait for the water crafts if those are trully coming soon.

Awesome game overall, but I do have a few requests. I wish that the physics could be a little more realistic, so it actually feels like I'm flying. For example, at just 20% throttle my speed will be like 400 knots, which is totally unrealistic. Also if i put throttle to 1%, it'll keep flying at 400, but if i go down to 0%, instead of gliding like in reality, the speed just drops instantly and the plane goes down. Also want more aircraft, as it gets boring. C-130,V-22 Osprey, maybe B-17...

Fun game. Got my brother and me hooked. Very challenging and fun. The driving controls not my thing. Could be more accurate. Update: Having learned the system better, the driving controls are fine. Just adjust on the controls page. Also love flying several planes at once in free flight. I really like this game. I hope you update as you said soon for more challenges. I want to be able to use the skyhook to rescue my crashes.

It's fun, the thing is it has a bunch of aircraft, and as well it has trucks, if you want more space, it has 2 maps, and it has different airports, times, and it has multiple times and seasons, and when you get an ad, it rewards you with money. Good game only problem is that if you don't have a good phone there can be a little bit of lag but besides that, exceptional game.

Holy cow this game is GOOD! Great detail, regularish update and some cool vehicles. Like they've got an Amphibious APC that you can see inside and a luxury VTOL. My only issue is the frame rate. It only gets to like 15fps. But the limit is 60🤔 We also need more planes.(armed and humvee inside) Maybe you guys should remake this into a all inclusive flight sim. Also add multiplayer with chat. The ad system works great 👌🏽. Oh and make the roads wider. One of if not the absolute best game ever!!

the game is awesome in many ways but on the other hand, may you allow free flight to have a continuation if one plays s free flight especially transporting vehicles to another airport. Another thing is that, those two passenger plans, they should have passengers visibly who board and travel to another place. Overall the game is quite good but kindly consider the reviews and this game will gain more support from end users for the benefit of the developer.

I personally love this flight simulator. The fact that it's free is pretty cool. There are a few things I (and others ) want to recommend. First of all we need building interiors! Having the 3D buildings are cool but there eneeds to be some insides for them. Next I think some of the physics should be altered since some of the ways the planes roll and move is a bit odd for an airplane especially the auto-pilots violent turning and pitching. Other then that great job and keep up the good work!

I REALLY love this game because I have been looking for a good flight simulator for years, and this one is GREAT. I only have a few complaints. 1, certain planes don't have liveries. 2, there are only propeller type airplanes in this game. 3, even though I know the developer probably won't add this, multiplater would be SUCH a great edition! And 4, there are some unfinished things that are unselectable and they get me so hyped its annoying so only add the options when they're finished. Thanks.

It's good but I kind of want more airplanes. Some of them can be based off. Actual ones And the There can be in the settings to choose if you want your airplane to break apart easily or not And also. More airports that is not on the main island like that island. I think my Fingers hurt

Have not tried takeoff yet, but one thing I've noticed is its difficult to get the forward thrust to zero when taxiing. So far seems pretty cool though, better than any other flight sim I've tried. It's fun, dont want it to be too easy but I can say its really difficult to even make check points. Still, I like it. Lose a star, the plane gets stuck in a stall and no way to get out of it, like it loses calibration and can't recalibrate.

This game is a lot awesome but I think you had better fix some problems that take a bit pleasure away, first is why the more you play and unlock next level, sometimes impossible to unlock another level, I'm told to get more currencies but no way to get them, so I end up in playing the levels I unlocked before. secondly, suggest that you expand the land add more places to fly and create passengers flight and so on, but big wish is to activate the unlockable levels coz I can't proceed.

I have re-written my review, I legit love this game, although, there are some features I would like to be added, such as being able to test out planes before use, as well as use the modifications for the plane. Another is to be able to teleport in free-flight. And the last ones, being able to start plane disasters, plane destruction effects, and planes not breaking into pieces when crashed. Also please get rid of free-flight ending when crashing. Overall, very good. I would add more but limit.

Amazing game I gave this 4 stars because it got a little boring after the first few days, it would be an amazing game if they added interactive cockpit, and I know that it says in the questions page why you can't do multiplayer, but if there was some way you could do like a local multiplayer over WiFi like in farming simulator 2016 for mobile, that would be amazing, it gets kinda lonely. Updates are also like twice a year. Overall great game though👌!

This is a really good and fun game. This game is almost as good as the simulators like xplane and infinite flight. The planes are animated good you can do practically anything you want even drive to city's and walk around and inside the aircraft. I am not giving it more stars until they ad more planes and vehicles. I personally would like to see q400 or c-130.

Good game, but a few things would be nice to add, bigger craft like the C-7 Galaxy and other big bois like that, also possibly WW2 aircraft, adding passengers and crew for aircraft would be cool too, witch I get that might affect performance especially if they move a lot but it would feel better than u being by yourself, also adding a feature that will let you select plane parts a destroy them for cool crashes would be nice, also allowing the player to be inside the plane while it breaks apart.

Like the idea of it but i hope they start addint more features for free flight and multiplayer because it gets boring because there is no "mission" you can set up. What i mean by that is you can't have certain vehicles start at certain aiports. Also the new vtol aircraft needs bigger propellers. The one its modeled off of can not have its propellers down when it is on the ground

one of my favorite games. however it could be better: 1) there needs to be military vehicles, jets, ships with weapons, along with enemy's to fight(aircraft, ships,ground vehicles)that you can either select where to put or be random(like the Sam's). 2) in the free flight the ground vehicles are useless, to fix it they should add what I said"1"and add an ability to make scenarios like the missions where we need to load stuff into vehicles and transport it etc...also more islands and road traffic.

I Highly recommend this game, not only is there great crash physics, the Aircraft models are really good 👍🏻 The Graphics..... not so much to be honest. The Aircraft is really easy to unlock, I feel like it's a little too easy, I spent something like 3-4 days playing it and I already brought everything, It's kinda boring now. Neverless, great game, the fact that it's free is also pretty good

really good game. Alot of planes and really gets the job done. alot of things to do in this game. thats why its the most sigma Flight Sim. only reason i gave it 4 stars was that too many stuff are locked and are not giving the game its full potential. if lesser items were llocked, then it is a complete 5 outta 5. and need more liveries. Ryanair, Korean air, air france, etc. and need more planes and vehicles with max potential.

just perfect, it has all the that a should have, and it has a realistic physics but I am giving it because there are no atc controls and if it has a more controls like the real one do like x plane does like for example to control the throttle control(mean we could control the engine power in every engine) and some more failures and alarms and more airplanes and more instrument monitors

star_5.text: Probably one of the best airplane mobile games I have ever played, controls are amazing, and very easy to learn, everything else is pretty good. I would like if there was more maps, or maybe bigger terrain, and more civilian planes and really more planes in general. Overall, very good game, would definitely recommend.

The game is rlly good in my opinion. I have a few suggestions: 1. Add cloud save. I have completed the game multiple times and I am getting tired. I play this game once in a while so Samsung auto deletes the game. 2. Add more islands/places and also add cargo and passenger missions on free play to earn more money. 3. Add night light for cities in the map and road traffic. A glide slope for airports would be nice too. 4. Add more role play features. So the game won't feel boring and more yt vids.

k I love the game, I would like guns though like Rifles and what not, and Trucks or submarines, Maybe even custom music or you could play from YouTube music! i would also like to have a avatar and I'm not complaining but it REALLY needs to be updated, and I would like the ability to swim down and up and a fighter jet would be nice to but overall it's a very fun game and is like the best airplane game I've ever came across

I absolutely LOVE this game! I'm excited to see the ov-1 Bronco vtol concept plane! and the gunships mode will be so cool! I do have a suggestion, if its possible, maybe make the crashes with smaller and more parts which can be configured in the settings. like the amount of parts and fire settings. Just a suggestion and idk if you read these. nice game! (sorry for the bad grammar)

Amazing game with cool features. Would recommend it for anyone who wants to fly. It would be way cooler if there were bigger maps, more planes, and maybe even rockets to shoot or enemy planes to defend against. I also have an idea for the devs to add to the next update if y'all wanted one: crash landing in water and safety equipment that we can use to essentially escape the plane from the icy waters. Also, biplanes or planes that land on the water.

I feel like this game needs a save system or a sign in system that way we wouldn't lose all our progress. This game is amazing though, I really like the way the camera angles look, the complexity of the damage, and the graphics. But there should also be a few more things the dev should add to the game. 1. Smoke and Fire effects. 2. Traffic system. 3. More ground vehicles. Other than that, 5 star game ofc.

This is easily my favorite flight simulator. It's also my favorite mobile game in general. It's one of the few that don't include ads mid-session, which is great. There's a decent variety of aircraft. Controls feel realistic, you don't feel like you're being kept in the air by magic. You actually feel the weight of your plane. The cars are really fun to drive too. It's crash physics are pretty good. My only suggestion would be individual engine control, for when you lose hydraulics. Great game.

This game is fantastic. I was dreading how long it took you to update the game, but now having in flight refueling, it was worth it. I have no problems in this game and it runs so smooth and I love it. I have no idea why people are blaming you for their bad phones honestly. But besides that, the game has great graphics, and its surprisingly easy to connect to the refuel plane and I wouldn't of thought the controls were that precise. I totally recommend this game, and cant wait for more updates.

I know I already asked this about 2 years ago, but could you maybe add multiplayer by bluetooth instead of by online. it might work, i am not sure. Kinda like the nintento Ds, where you could play with friends as long as you are close to one another. Either that, or as long as you are connected with the same wifi. i am not sure if that one involves servers though. I keep asking for multiplayer because it would be great to play with friends and do cool things together like car stunts, or pranks.

THE BEST FREE FLIGHT SIMULATOR!!!!!! Not particularly realistic but if you want a mobile game to chill and play this is awesome. You only have to watch a few ads and then you get all the planes forever. There are also a bunch of cool features such as walking around! Overall this game is super awesome and I would pay 5$ for it if I had too!!!

By far one of the most well done flight simulators on the play store and I have played. I could definitely tell that the dev(s) put their heart in this and the fact that there are so many unlockables like different airplanes, vehicles,places, airports, and a bunch of extras like autopilot, air drops and plenty more im not remembering. It can be a bit tricky/difficult to get the hang of flying just find the rite settings for you and practice. Definitely recommend if you are in flight simulators..

Love it! Please add more planes! And yes, i do want the Private Seaplane PS-26. And a suggestion, like, on different airports there are planes that you can take. Like, say you destroy the RL-42, you can find another one at a different airport. Please add more places to hide signals. Like, say add a haunted airplane crash with a weird signal, like first it was at a certain spot. Then the next time you play, it's somewhere else. You can only find it at night. You can go in it, please add it.

Good, but it could be better. We need working TVs in the VTOL, we need more planes, we need the more planes and vehicles update NOW, we also need more islands and Archipelago could use more land, but i really like the way you can just take 1500 credits (I think) and watch 8 ads later. Also, more destructible parts (like make the destruction physics more detailed). If you could add any of these sometime soon, that would be wonderful. I also really love this game and wish there were more like it.

This is by far the best sandbox flight simulator on the Play store. It's full of content where it needs to be, but completely bland everywhere else in a way that fosters imagination in a way that I haven't felt since I was a child. I can get on this game and play for hours in free-play without getting bored at all. Buying new vehicles and equipment is amazing with the game's rewarded ad system, which allows you to use watching ads as a form of salary and even allows you to take out ad loans.

I love this game. It can't get any simpler than that. It has amazing gameplay, decent graphics, few planes (but there is a VTOL so its fine to me), and its not hard to master. I wish there were some smaller planes, but I am comfortable with the selection as of now. Ever since I got this game, I have played it more than Among Us. Seriously, try it out! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

You can do SO much in this game! its amazing right from start, and the ability to earn all in-game currency and game modes/missions is incredible. "My compliments to the chief" would be the expansive Free Play mode. My request would be a few more cargo options and maybe a new model. (It would be cool to see an Osprey.) Overall, im keeping the game. its a fun, stable flight sim i can keep going back to. Im exited to see future updates. Time to put in more flight time!

I have had this game for at least a year now. This is one of my favorite games I probably ever had BUT I have three things. One, it takes way to long for the updates, you need to work faster AND harder. The second thing is that I have been waiting FOREVER to use all the rest of the customs for the Plaines. Third thing is I think you should add more planes and add a firefighter plane to pit out fires around the island/map. But over all 5 stars, best game I have ever had. Great jop! 😁😁👍👍👍👍

I like the game. 5 stars. As an aviator, i can already tell that this game is awesome. I kinda got confused about the controls, but now I know how to play. Ads are okay for the tokens. Maybe in the next update, you can add failures, day and night cycle for 150 tokens, sparks, and more missions. I like this game for about like 5 years or so. It's the best game I've seen.

Best Flight Simulator! I like to play games wrong, and this one does not disappoint. I crashed, broke the tail, left the reverse thrusters on, and then exited the plane. The broken plane was going around backward on the flighline in a circle. I also took the plane down a road into a tunnel and broke it there. Too much fun! 😁 Highly recommend.

I have to say man. I absolutely LOVE this game. I love how you're able to control multi planes at once plus all the freedom you get in the game. I am, however, BEGGING for the update that finally adds ships. I'd even make the suggestion of lighter aircraft and an aircraft carrier that you can sail with the ability to add light aircraft to the ship. Love the game!!!
